events.title: Guests Arrive

events.title: Grand Exit

notes: Ceremony will be held at Good Hope Presbyterian Church.
Refreshments, dinner, dancing, and our grand exit will be at the outdoor pavilion at Mt Zion United Methodist Church, just down the road.
Schedule times are approximate and subject to minor adjustments.
